text: TikTok blocked 33,000 spam accounts and nearly 100,000 fake accounts in Romania and identified a December 2024 network of 27,217 accounts that attempted to promote AUR and Georgescu via large-scale comment posting. TikTok acknowledged that a Romanian individual had spent around one million euros on Georgescu's campaign including 360,000 euros paid to other TikTok users to disseminate pro-Georgescu content, practices that contravened both Romanian electoral regulations and TikTok's own political ads policy.
